name: @snowluma/proton
description: Compile-time protobuf encoder/decoder generator for SnowLuma. TypeScript interfaces → fully-inlined, zero-runtime protobuf codec functions. Vendored from SnowLuma/protobuf-dsl (reference copy under dev/protobuf-dsl/) with edge-case fixes applied.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm --out-dir dist --target node20 --external typescript --external vite
